codeReview.summary: Fix commit d8490fc adequately addresses the blocking issue from orch-feature-leads. FeatureLeadManager is now properly integrated with Orchestrator state: (1) Added feature_lead_manager field to Orchestrator struct with proper initialization in both constructors, (2) Wired spawn_feature_lead to register leads with the manager, (3) Fixed get_active_feature_leads and has_feature_lead to query the manager instead of returning empty/false, (4) Added public async APIs get_active_feature_leads, has_feature_lead, get_feature_lead, remove_feature_lead for external observability, (5) Fixed ExecutionController cleanup to remove from both orchestrator manager and local cache, (6) Fixed parent_orch reference to use self.orchestrator.clone() instead of creating a new orphaned Orchestrator instance.

summary: Reviewed fix for orch-feature-leads. The fix properly addresses the prior blocking issue where spawned FeatureLeads were only stored in ExecutionController's local map and not surfaced through Orchestrator state. All expected behaviors are implemented: Orchestrator owns and updates active FeatureLead lifecycle state via FeatureLeadManager; spawned leads are visible through orchestrator query/state methods (get_active_feature_leads, has_feature_lead, get_feature_lead); lifecycle is updated during execution flow (registration on spawn) and cleanup (remove_feature_lead called after task completion). Build and clippy pass for swell-orchestrator.
